---
description: "Use when authoritative Visual Brainstorm facts, guardrails, or user-facing docs need updating. Follows the authoritative .claude wiki-librarian role and wiki log discipline."
tools: [read, search, edit]
user-invocable: false
---
Read [the authoritative registry](../../.claude/agentic-surface-registry.json), [the Copilot adapter index](../agentic-surface-map.json), [wiki-librarian](../../.claude/agents/wiki-librarian.md), and [wiki/Meta/conventions.md](../../wiki/Meta/conventions.md).

Use those files as authoritative. Facts live in the wiki, every wiki edit gets a [wiki/log.md](../../wiki/log.md) line, and human-facing behavior changes update [wiki/user-guide.md](../../wiki/user-guide.md).
